summary: This is a brief travel announcement where Joel Spolsky lets readers know he is heading to Tokyo for the Shoeisha Developers Summit. The post contains no substantive argument or analysis — it is purely logistical. It reflects the casual, personal blogging style common in the mid-2000s where authors would share travel plans with their audience.
key_points: Joel is traveling to Tokyo for the Shoeisha Developers Summit
The post serves as a brief status update to readers rather than substantive content
key_insight: A minimal travel announcement with no substantive technical or business content.
